title: Alumni
headings: Welcome to the IIIT-Bangalore Alumni Page: Donate Sign Up
body: IIIT-Bangalore alumni consisting of over 3500 graduates (as on July 2021) are the true ambassadors of the Institute. They occupy key positions in major Indian and international corporations and are actively engaged in mentoring current students on the campus. Our alumni are spread all across the world and have achieved various feats as researchers and entrepreneurs. Network : The alumni association is an immense network of professional contacts—all with whom you already have one thing in common. Need to get a foot in the door for your next job, or curious if an organization that’s pursuing you is the right fit? You should also attend events and join professional groups to build relationships over the long-term. Future Generation : Mentor current students and help them excel during placements, advise on academic projects and higher education, give technical talks and share industry experiences, encourage them to become entrepreneurs and researchers. title: Cafeteria
body: The institute is home to an ever expanding menu of fresh and inventive dining. Healthy nutrition is needed for all round performance and hence, the cafeteria has menus offering nutritious and wholesome food to ensure a well-balanced diet. IIIT-B cafeteria offers North-Indian delights to South-Indian cuisines, popular world delicacies, and also has an exclusive Jain food section. The menu is curated monthly by students’ food committee, keeping it in line with students’ taste buds. The committee interacts with the food vendors for the mess and café to decide the menu and also inspects hygiene conditions, apart from seeking students’ feedback about food quality. The campus also houses a bakery and two beverage stalls for out of hours’ cravings.

title: Committees & Clubs
body: Various student committees are active on the campus and look after specific aspects of student activities. Alumni, branding, food, placement, sports, photography, theatre, art and cultural festival are some of the areas handled by various students’ committees. A group of students also voluntarily get together to pursue an extra curricular or co-curricular activity with some broadly defined goals, and form a student club. For the past several years, some of the active students’ clubs on the campus include 8-Bit, Chhayachitra, Zense, Enigma and Aikyam.

title: Students Events and Festivals
body: Want to listen to a lecture or music, prove your mettle in debates, have a flare for creative writing, want to showcase your dancing finesse, hone photography skills, master the art of stage performances, there is always something going on. IIIT-B hosts a range of events on the campus round the year. Largely organized and run by academic departments and students, the events provide multiple ways to connect. TEDx talks, hackathons, cultural events, sports events, research showcase events and art competitions are just few to mention, shaping social and intellectual fabric of the campus. Yamini , an overnight series of concerts featuring the luminaries of the Indian classical and dance forms, is a popular annual event hosted by IIIT-B. In addition, distinguished guests visit IIIT-B regularly and offer distinctive views formed by their experiences and expertise.

title: Explore IIIT-B
body: The International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore (IIIT-B), a deemed to be University, was established in 1998 with a vision to contribute to the IT world through education and research, entrepreneurship and innovation. The autonomous institute has consistently been at the forefront of IT education and innovation. More than 3,500 students have graduated from the institute since its inception, and serve in over 100 well-known IT product and services companies. The institute alumni have also founded more than 50 enterprises. The institute attracts students from all over India and abroad and has the unique distinction of selecting 100% students on merit from across the country and abroad, pushing up the level of discourse and peer group at the institute. It has a unique positioning as a leading technology institute with its interdisciplinary courses which crisscross information technology and social sciences being pursued by students from diverse academic backgrounds. title: Library Collection
body: IIIT-B Library started functioning with a small collection of books donated by the Founder-Director Prof. S. Sadagopan at the ITPL Campus.  The motto of the library is to provide the right information/resource at the right time in the right format to the user. The primary mission of the library is to provide the required educational resources both in print and electronic format for teaching & learning activities, support the academic and research activities of the institution, and to contribute towards fulfilling the vision set by the institute and to extend its reach to the benefit of the larger professional community. The vision of the IIIT-B library is to build a dynamic learning environment conducive for teaching, learning and research activities of the IIIT-B community and to provide and  organize information resources and services to the academic community that are avant-garde, diverse, and of top quality. In accordance with the vision and objectives of the institute, the library

title: Clubs
body: The vision of Enigma is to promote robotics related activities at IIIT-B. It organizes a large number of workshops, and works on a diversity of projects related to robotics. Aikyam is the social wing of IIIT-Bangalore that was started in 2008 by the students of IIIT-Bangalore. Literature helps us understand the world in a better Art is an act of expressing feelings, thoughts, and observations. Lean In Circle is a club to promote women in computing, open source, research, competitive coding and tech. title: Events
body: Infin8 is an inter College Cultural Festival organized by IIIT-B every year. It is a three-day event packed with simulation games, cultural activities, fun field games and much more. title: Placement Committee
body: The Placement Committee at IIIT Bangalore, comprising final-year students, serves as a vital link between the student community and the numerous companies that visit our campus. The committee supports students in their placement preparation and coordinates the end-to-end execution of on-campus recruitment drives. Being part of this committee offers the opportunity to interact with every member of the graduating batch, and witnessing each student secure their placement is an experience of immense pride and fulfilment. The committee also works closely with the Institute’s Placement Cell, administration, and faculty, providing members with valuable professional exposure and a deeper understanding of institutional processes.
